title: Red Hat makes Ansible the execution layer for agentic AI systems
description: Red Hat is positioning its Ansible automation platform as the critical execution layer for agentic AI operations, introducing ephemeral MCP servers and expanded generative AI capabilities to help enterprises safely deploy AI agents in production environments. At Cisco Live EMEA in Amsterdam, we sat down with Sathish Balakrishnan, VP and General Manager of Red Hat’s [...]

title: Sarvam launches startup programme offering AI credits, tools to boost India’s developer ecosystem
description: Under the program, participating startups will receive six to 12 months of API credits matched to their scale, along with access to Sarvam’s core AI capabilities including speech-to-text, text-to-speech, translation, chat completion and document intelligence APIs.

title: B2 Communications Adds AI Search Specialization
description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--B2 Communications is expanding its services to include content optimization for AI-driven “answer engines.”

title: Can Anthropic’s CFO sell Wall Street on an AI firm Washington calls a ‘risk’?
description: Anthropic’s clash with the Pentagon and its “supply chain risk” designation may create headwinds for the company, Wedbush’s Dan Ives says.

title: Inside DeepWaste AI: PointFive’s Four-Layer Model for Detecting Full-Stack AI Inefficiency
description: PointFive launches DeepWasteTM AI, a four-layer system to detect waste across AI models, tokens, caching, and infra.The post Inside DeepWaste AI: PointFive’s Four-Layer Model for Detecting Full-Stack AI Inefficiency appeared first on TechAnnouncer.
